title: ZKProofVerificationRecord
description: Protocol-owned trusted proof-verification record for one immutable proof identity and verifier implementation posture.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for trusted proof-verification records.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this proof-verification record.

proof_digest.description: Digest identity of the canonical proof artifact object being verified.

statement_family.description: Statement-family identifier from the statement_family registry.

curve_id.description: Curve identifier for the proof scheme backend.

circuit_id.description: Circuit identifier from the circuit_id registry.

constraint_system_digest.description: Constraint-system digest declared by the proof and required by verifier posture.

verifier_key_digest.description: Verifier-key digest declared by the proof and required by verifier posture.

setup_provenance_digest.description: Setup-provenance digest declared by the proof and required by verifier posture.

normalization_profile_id.description: Logical normalization profile identifier from the normalization_profile_id registry.

scheme_adapter_id.description: Scheme-adapter identifier from the scheme_adapter_id registry.

public_inputs_digest.description: Digest identity for canonicalized proof public inputs used during verification.

verifier_implementation_id.description: Trusted verifier implementation identity including module/version posture.

verified_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when trusted verification completed.

verification_outcome.description: Deterministic verification outcome for the referenced proof identity under current verifier posture.

reason_codes.description: Stable machine-consumed reason codes from the proof_verification_reason_code registry.

cache_provenance.description: Optional cache provenance for this verification decision.
